ddls:
CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset (e.g., fixed, intangible) */,
  "asset_value" REAL /* Value of the asset */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that owns the asset */,
  "acquisition_date" TEXT /* Date when the asset was acquired */,
  "depreciation_rate" REAL /* Rate at which the asset depreciates */,
  "current_value" REAL /* Current value of the asset, considering depreciation */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the asset */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vendor from whom the asset was purchased */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty of the asset expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department's budget */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenses" (
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense */,
  "expense_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense */,
  "expense_type" TEXT /* Type of expense (e.g., monthly, other) */,
  "expense_amount" REAL /* Amount of the expense */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that incurred the expense */,
  "expense_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense was incurred */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used to pay the expense (e.g., check, credit card) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Number of the invoice associated with the expense */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the expense */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the expense was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenses_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expense_types" (
  "expense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expense type */,
  "expense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the expense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department that generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., balance sheet, income statement) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., accountant, financial analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense being accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget being accessed */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being audited */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense being audited */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being audited */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget being audited */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being audited */,
  "audit_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "audit_action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., create, update, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audits_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being versioned */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense being versioned */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being versioned */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget being versioned */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_controls" (
  "access_control_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted access */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset being accessed */,
  "expense_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expense being accessed */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* ID of the budget being accessed */,
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecast being accessed */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_control_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_expense_id FOREIGN KEY ("expense_id") REFERENCES expenses ("expense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_controls_forecast_id FOREIGN KEY ("forecast_id") REFERENCES forecasts ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department being budgeted */,
  "budget_amount" REAL /* Amount of the budget */,
  "budget_date" TEXT /* Date when the budget was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasts" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecast */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department being forecasted */,
  "forecast_amount" REAL /* Amount of the forecast */,
  "forecast_date" TEXT /* Date when the forecast was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forecasts_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)
